latestEntry.talkTitle: A Lesson on Elementary, Worldly Wisdom, Revisited
latestEntry.notes: Week 4 Day 2 of Talk 3. Mental Models focus: Latticework recap, Ideological Bias, Incentive-Caused Bias + Social Proof corruption loop, Navy Model of Accountability, Pari-Mutuel / Mispricing. 5 case snapshots: workers comp fraud, AI content farms, product manager sunk cost, Berkshire one-foot fence, startup tech ideology.
